brand.name: Awake
brand.tagline: We awaken strategic clarity so brands stop being just an option and become the solution.
brand.shortTagline: We awaken brands with radar vision.

home.metaTitle: Awake Marketing — We awaken brands with radar vision.
home.metaDescription: We transform invisible businesses into creative brands and thoughtful strategies.

hero.title: We power your brand.
hero.body: We transform invisible businesses into creative brands and thoughtful strategies.
hero.bodyItalic: between the business and your community.

manifesto.title: We don't sell smoke. We sell structure.
manifesto.body: There are brands with enormous potential trapped in a disorganized operation.
manifesto.bodyRest: . We diagnose what's blocking growth, organize execution, and build a visual presence that conveys authority from the very first second.

method.title: Four phases. Zero filler.
method.intro: From diagnosis to measurable impact. Each phase has clear deliverables and progress criteria.

phases.name: Clarity
phases.body: Technical audit of the digital ecosystem. SWOT analysis and competitive positioning. We identify the frictions blocking growth.

phases.name: Order
phases.body: Action matrix that converts diagnosis into roadmap. We define execution criteria and the brand's strategic direction.

phases.name: Enhancement
phases.body: Coherent narrative and visual system. Branding, typography, and art direction that validates your capability and builds immediate trust.

phases.name: Expansion
phases.body: Channel management and high-impact communication. The brand grows constantly, measurably, and strategically.

pillars.title: We are built on 4 pillars.
pillars.intro: Four principles that guide how we make every decision for your brand.

items.title: Empathy
items.body: Your brand is not a number, it's our priority. We tune in to your purpose so our energy works in harmony with yours. Achievements backed by your peace of mind.

items.title: Creativity
items.body: We believe in beauty with purpose. Without strategy there are no sales, but without visual impact there's no memory. We fuse art with data so your brand not only looks good, but performs.

items.title: Energy
items.body: We work with our feet on the ground and energy high. Having the right energy is fundamental to keeping the process flowing, while maintaining the technical rigor your business demands.

items.title: Tenacity
items.body: We are defined by a healthy obsession with success. We are not observers, we are allies who fight for your market share. At Awake, giving up is not a strategic option.

services.title: What we do for your brand.
services.intro: Four lines of work. One single obsession: getting your business back where it matters.

items.name: Branding
items.desc: Complete visual system, naming, usage guide and art direction.

items.name: Social media
items.desc: Strategy, content, monthly photo session and community management.

items.name: Web
items.desc: Design and development that converts. Technical SEO and monthly analytics.

items.name: Paid campaigns
items.desc: Meta Ads and Google Ads focused on local. Transparent reporting from day one.

voiceAndTone.title: Friendly but serious. Direct. No gimmicks.
voiceAndTone.intro: We speak person to person. What we say, we deliver. What we can't deliver, we don't promise.
yesItems: Your profile is losing customers every day.
I'll tell you exactly what's wrong. Free.
Visible results in 60 days or we stop.
noItems: We're the best agency in Spain.

cta.quote: We work with established physical businesses that struggle to achieve presence in digital media. They have REAL clients, but their social media doesn't show their potential.
cta.body: Book a free diagnosis. We'll tell you exactly what's failing in your digital ecosystem, and whether we can help. No commitment.

about.metaDescription: Who we are, why we're called Awake and how we work. Mission, vision and values.
about.heroTitle: We awaken strategic clarity so brands stop being just an option and become the solution.
about.mision: Transform businesses through strategic order and high-impact design. We resolve structural failures to convert invisible brands into profitable and authoritative assets.
about.vision: Scale our global impact helping brands from around the world reach their maximum potential. We aspire to democratize access to high-level strategy and authority design.
about.valoresIntro: Not decorations: these are the criteria we use to make every decision for your brand.

valores.title: Insight
valores.subtitle: Radar Vision
valores.body: We don't stay on the surface. We analyze what others ignore to find the diamond in the rough.

valores.title: Stubborn commitment
valores.subtitle: We don't stop until we get there
valores.body: Our client's challenge is our personal battle.

valores.title: Radical clarity
valores.subtitle: No noise
valores.body: We speak the truth, diagnose with precision and eliminate noise so the client's message is direct.

valores.title: Empathic energy
valores.subtitle: Good vibes with grit
valores.body: We work with good energy, but with our feet on the ground. We understand the human behind the brand to boost their business with drive and determination.

valores.title: Aesthetic excellence
valores.subtitle: Strategy + beauty
valores.body: Strategy without beauty doesn't impact, and beauty without strategy doesn't sell. We seek the perfect balance.

sinceridad.title: Your business deserves to exist
sinceridad.body: We work with established physical businesses that struggle to achieve presence in digital media. They have REAL clients, but their social media doesn't show their potential.

about.glosarioTitle: Three words you'll hear us repeat.

glosario.def: Means nucleus. It reinforces our mission to get to the root of the problem and solve it from within.
Our ability to cut through the noise and locate the brand's diamond even in the darkness of chaos.
Our refusal to give up on our clients' challenges.

services.metaDescription: Diagnosis, branding and social media management. The CORE Method applied to clear packages and honest pricing.
services.heroBody: We make your brand stand out, connect, inspire and attract. Strategy + creativity + presence
services.coreTitle: The transformation system we apply to every client.
services.coreIntro: Four stages that go straight to the core. Each package uses this method according to your brand's current moment.

coreMethodFull.title: Clarity
coreMethodFull.body: We understand your brand in depth.

coreMethodFull.title: Order
coreMethodFull.body: We fix, confront, maintain and exploit opportunities. We make key decisions and define the direction. It's the bridge where analysis becomes judgment.

coreMethodFull.title: Expansion
coreMethodFull.body: With a solid foundation, your brand is ready to scale.

services.diagnosticoIntro: Before spending a euro on design or social media, you need to understand what's holding your brand back. We always start here.
services.brandingIntro: Identity, image, construction, tone and brand DNA. Three levels, one single objective: looking like what it is.
services.brandingNote: Note: at a senior agency in Alicante / Valencia, the CORE + Total Branding Pack would cost around €2,500. The €990 price is promotional for 2026.
services.webIntro: From a clean institutional website to a full e-commerce. Every project is designed respecting the established brand identity.
services.rrssIntro: Five packages designed for your brand's lifecycle. PRO is our recommendation: the right balance between design and growth.
services.pagosIntro: Everything clear from minute one. So Awake remains a healthy business and you know what you're getting into.
services.ctaBody: If you're not sure, we'll figure it out together in the free consultation. 30 minutes, no commitment, with an honest recommendation.

items.body: 50% upfront to reserve your slot and start the Radar. Remaining 50% before delivery of final files or publication.

items.title: −5% for single payment
items.body: If you pay the full cycle upfront (3 or 6 months), we apply a 5% discount for immediate single transfer.

items.title: Methods
items.body: Bank transfer, Revolut or PayPal (PayPal fees are charged to the client).

items.title: VAT
items.body: If you need an invoice, VAT is added to the published price.

diagnosticoTiers.name: Discovery Consultation
diagnosticoTiers.tagline: We get to know each other, understand what your brand needs and give you a quote. If your brand is fine, we'll tell you. If we can't help you, we'll tell you too.

diagnosticoTiers.name: RADAR Diagnosis
diagnosticoTiers.tagline: The first step of the CORE Method. Current situation audit, SWOT and actionable roadmap.

brandingTiers.name: Basic Rebranding
brandingTiers.tagline: For those who already exist. Brands with a base that look outdated or disorganised.

brandingTiers.name: Rebranding + Social
brandingTiers.tagline: The boost. For those who want to refresh their image and start showing it with strategy.

brandingTiers.name: CORE Pack + Total Branding
brandingTiers.priceNote: + VAT · 2026 promotional price (€2,500 at a senior agency)
brandingTiers.tagline: The full awakening. For a brand that is born or reinvents itself from scratch.
features: CORE strategy: clarity, objective and strategic guide
Visual identity: logo (3 proposals + revisions), palette, typography and mini brand guide
Launch kit: 8 Instagram posts (sales strategy), 4 capture stories and logo animation for Reels
Pro tools: digital card, quote and services templates, email/WhatsApp signature and 5 Canva templates
Commercial dossier in PDF + personalised advisory session

webTiers.name: Basic Website
webTiers.tagline: Solid digital presence for freelancers and small businesses that need to convey professionalism from day one.
features: Institutional site up to 4 main sections
Responsive design adapted to your brand identity
Basic speed optimisation and technical SEO
One full round of minor adjustments

webTiers.name: Extended Website
webTiers.tagline: For businesses looking to stand out with a more sophisticated digital image and greater content capacity.
features: Full website up to 6 sections with editorial structure
Two rounds of minor adjustments for maximum customisation

webTiers.name: E-commerce & Complex Projects
webTiers.priceNote: Budget according to scope and features
webTiers.tagline: Online stores, payment integrations, memberships, portals and any project that goes beyond standard design.
features: Requirements analysis and personalised technical proposal
E-commerce with cart, payment gateway and stock management
ERP, CRM or external system integrations
Support and maintenance defined per project

rrsssTiers.name: Gold Pack — Awakening
rrsssTiers.tagline: So you feel like "someone finally handles everything" at a price you can afford.
features: 1 hour of basic photos and videos
Gift: bio adjustment and highlight covers (first month)

rrsssTiers.name: PRO Pack
rrsssTiers.tagline: The perfect balance between design and growth.
features: 5 posts + 2 Reels + 2 designed interaction stories + 2 editable stories

rrsssTiers.name: Elite Pack
rrsssTiers.tagline: Maximum impact. For brands that want to dominate their niche.

rrsssTiers.name: Custom Pack
rrsssTiers.priceNote: According to Reels, management and brand stage
rrsssTiers.tagline: When no pack fits. We start with the free consultation and build something tailored to you.
features: Personalised proposal according to brand lifecycle
Combines branding, content and/or audiovisual production
If it's not needed or we can't help, we'll tell you

contact.metaDescription: Book your free discovery consultation: 30 minutes by video call to understand what your brand needs.
contact.heroTitle2: and understand what your brand needs.
contact.heroBody: If your brand is fine, we'll tell you. If we can't help you, we'll also tell you. No fine print.
benefits: Initial diagnosis and honest recommendation on next steps.
If we're a match, we'll quote you on the spot.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What's holding you back today? What do you need?
contact.toastSuccess: Message received. We'll be in touch soon.
contact.toastError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.faqTitle: What people ask us before we start.

faq.a: 50% on booking and 50% before delivery or publication. You get −5% if you pay the full cycle upfront (3 or 6 months).
Published prices are excluding VAT. If you need an invoice, we add it.
Yes. The Custom Pack is quoted according to your brand's specific needs and business stage.
